template.description: Master system prompt template that combines base personality, creative type, mode, and runtime data

section.name: base_personality
section.purpose: Defines fundamental AI behavior and principles

section.name: mode
section.purpose: Adapts interaction style for specific context

section.name: runtime_context
section.purpose: Adds current conversation context and state

rule.name: order
rule.sequence: base → creative → mode → memory → context → boundaries
rule.rationale: Builds from general principles to specific runtime data

rule.name: optimization
rule.method: Remove redundant content and optimize structure

rule.name: validation
rule.method: Ensure XML validity and required sections

variable.name: user_type
variable.options: writer, musician, filmmaker, director, creative, analyst, default

variable.name: current_task
variable.description: What user is currently working on

variable.name: emotional_state
variable.options: neutral, happy, sad, frustrated, anxious, excited, confused

output_format.description: Final compiled prompt structure for AI model

structure.system_prompt: Combined XML content from all sections with variables injected and optimized for model consumption

check.name: section_completeness
check.description: Verify all required sections are present

check.name: variable_resolution
check.description: Ensure all variables are properly replaced

check.name: length_optimization
check.description: Keep prompt within model token limits
